settings.heading: Why Does This Work?
settings.content:
The burning, tingling, and sensitivity you feel is your nerves under oxidative stress and poor blood flow. R-Alpha Lipoic Acid addresses this at the cellular level through four key mechanisms.

1. Powerful Antioxidant Action
R-ALA neutralises free radicals that damage nerve fibres. It also converts to DHLA inside the body, which regenerates Vitamin C, Vitamin E, and Glutathione — amplifying your entire antioxidant network. No other single antioxidant covers as much ground.

2. Improved Nerve Blood Flow
Poor circulation is a major driver of nerve degradation. R-ALA enhances nitric oxide availability, dilating small blood vessels and restoring oxygen and nutrient delivery to peripheral nerves.

3. Anti-Inflammatory Effects
R-ALA suppresses the NF-κB inflammatory pathway and reduces cytokines (TNF-α, IL-6, IL-1β) that cause nerve hyper-excitability and pain. Less inflammation means calmer, less reactive nerves.

4. Nerve Repair and Regeneration
R-ALA upregulates Nerve Growth Factor (NGF) and BDNF — proteins critical for nerve survival and repair. It also protects the myelin sheath, which is essential for fast, efficient nerve signalling.

600mg of pure R-form ALA per serving, paired with Organic Coconut Oil for optimal absorption. This is why it works when other supplements do not.

settings.heading: Is It Safe?
settings.content:
Yes. Alpha-lipoic acid has been used in clinical and wellness settings for decades and is generally well tolerated. R-ALA in particular is the naturally occurring form already present in the body.

Romira R-Alpha Lipoic Acid is 100% natural, non-GMO, vegan, and made without artificial fillers, binders, or preservatives. Every batch is third-party tested for purity and potency and produced in a GMP-certified facility in the USA.

Free from: Gluten, Soy, Eggs, Dairy, Nuts, Preservatives, and Animal Products.

The most commonly noted side effect is mild nausea in a small number of users, particularly on an empty stomach. Taking capsules with food reduces this and also improves absorption. If you are managing blood sugar or taking diabetes medication, consult your healthcare provider before use.

settings.heading: Ingredients
settings.content:
Each daily serving (2 veggie capsules) contains:

600mg R-Alpha Lipoic Acid — The naturally active R-form. Not a racemic mixture.

Organic Coconut Oil — Included because R-ALA is fat-soluble. Supports proper absorption.

Other Ingredients: Vegetable cellulose (capsule shell). Nothing else.

Free from: Gluten, Soy, Eggs, Dairy, Nuts, Preservatives, Animal Products.

Made in the USA — GMP Certified, Third-Party Lab Tested.

If for any reason you are not completely satisfied after completing your 60-day protocol, we will issue a full refund, no questions asked. Simply contact our support team and we will take care of you.

The constant burning in my feet had just... quieted. My husband noticed before I even said anything. I am not dramatic about supplements but this one genuinely changed my mornings.

I started Romira and by week four the nighttime flare-ups had calmed significantly. By week six I was sleeping through the night. I cannot overstate what that means to daily life.

By month two I was genuinely more comfortable walking and standing for any length of time. It works in a way that is different from anything else I have tried.

settings.title: Pins and needles gone after years
settings.body: I have had pins and needles in my hands and feet for years. Waking up at 3am because your hands have gone numb is exhausting. After staying consistent with Romira for 60 days, the nighttime episodes dropped dramatically. I am sleeping better, moving more freely. Worth every single penny.

settings.title: My doctor said nothing would help. He was wrong.
settings.body: I was told the nerve damage was just something I would have to manage. I refused to accept that. After two months on Romira the tingling in my feet is a fraction of what it was. The daily burning that made every step uncomfortable has genuinely reduced. I wish I had found this two years ago.

settings.title: My hands stopped going numb at night
settings.body: I would wake up every single night with both hands completely numb — I'd have to shake them for minutes before they felt normal again. It was exhausting. After about six weeks on Romira the episodes became less frequent and by week ten they had almost stopped entirely. I sleep straight through now. Something I had genuinely stopped believing was possible.

settings.title: I can walk the dog again without stopping
settings.body: The burning in my feet made every walk a negotiation with myself about how far I could go before it became too much. I had cut my dog walks from 40 minutes down to 10. After two months on Romira I am back to full walks. The burning is still there slightly but it no longer stops me. That is a meaningful change to my daily life.

settings.heading: Hear from customers who trust Romira
When and how should I take it?
settings.row_content: Take 2 capsules daily with a meal that contains some healthy fat — this supports absorption since R-ALA is fat-soluble. Morning or evening both work well. Stay consistent �� R-ALA works cumulatively, so daily use over 60 days gives you the best results and the full benefit of our guarantee.

settings.heading: How long until I see results?
settings.row_content: R-ALA works cumulatively — it supports the underlying cellular processes connected to nerve health rather than providing instant relief. Most people begin noticing improvements in nerve comfort between weeks 2 and 4. Nighttime tingling and burning are often the first things to ease. Give it the full 60 days for a proper evaluation — which is exactly why we offer the 60-day guarantee.

settings.heading: What is R-Alpha Lipoic Acid?
settings.row_content: Alpha-lipoic acid (ALA) is a naturally occurring antioxidant compound found in every cell of the body. It plays a key role in energy production inside the mitochondria. R-Alpha Lipoic Acid is the naturally occurring, biologically active form — the one your body produces and recognises. It is both water- and fat-soluble, meaning it can provide antioxidant protection across more cellular environments than virtually any other antioxidant.

settings.heading: Will this help with diabetic neuropathy?
settings.row_content: Alpha-lipoic acid has been studied extensively in the context of nerve health and glucose metabolism. Many of our customers with diabetic neuropathy have reported meaningful improvements in tingling, burning, and nighttime discomfort with consistent daily use. If you are managing blood sugar or taking diabetes medication, please consult your healthcare provider before starting — as ALA supports glucose metabolism and may interact with blood sugar management.

settings.heading: How is Romira R-ALA different from other supplements?
settings.row_content: Three things set Romira apart: the form, the absorption support, and the guarantee. We use the pure R-form — not a cheap racemic mixture of R and S forms. We include Organic Coconut Oil in every capsule to support fat-soluble absorption. And we back everything with a 60-day money-back guarantee because we want you to have the full evaluation window. Made in the USA in a GMP-certified facility, third-party tested.

settings.heading: Are there any side effects?
settings.row_content: R-ALA is generally well tolerated. A small number of users report mild nausea, which can usually be avoided by taking capsules with food. If you are managing blood sugar levels or taking diabetes medication, consult your healthcare provider before use. If you have any underlying health conditions or take prescription medication, check with your doctor before starting.

settings.heading: What if it does not work for me?
settings.row_content: We offer a full 60-day money-back guarantee. If after 60 days of consistent daily use you are not satisfied, simply contact our support team and we will refund you in full — no questions asked, no hassle. We stand behind the product completely.

settings.heading: Can I take it with other supplements or medications?
settings.row_content: R-ALA is generally considered safe alongside most supplements and actually supports the regeneration of other antioxidants including Vitamin C, Vitamin E, and Glutathione. If you are taking prescription medication — particularly for blood sugar, inflammation, or neurological conditions — consult your healthcare provider before use.

settings.p1_heading: The Real Reason Your Nerves Won't Stop Burning
settings.p1_body: Your nerve cells are the most energy-hungry cells in your body. They need constant fuel just to stay alive, send signals, and repair themselves. When that fuel runs out — your nerves are the first to break down. And once they start, they do not stop on their own.
settings.bullet_1: Burning and tingling that gets worse at night
settings.bullet_2: Numbness spreading through your hands toes, and feet
settings.bullet_3: Pins and needles waking you up at 3am
settings.bullet_4: Pain your doctor says you just have to manage
settings.p2_heading: Repair your nerves from the inside out
settings.p2_body: Romira R-Alpha Lipoic Acid enters the nerve cell directly — clearing the damage, restoring the energy your nerves need to survive, and rebuilding the protection that years of breakdown have stripped away.

settings.heading: Early Warning Signs
settings.text: Occasional tingling or numbness in hands and feet. Usually worse at night. Most people assume it will pass — and ignore it for months.

settings.heading: The Discomfort Sets In
settings.text: Burning, electric shocks, and pins-and-needles become daily. Sleep suffers. Simple tasks — walking, holding objects — become uncomfortable.

settings.heading: Your World Gets Smaller
settings.text: Chronic nerve discomfort limits mobility, disrupts sleep, and affects mood. Many have tried multiple approaches with little lasting relief. This is where R-ALA works differently.

settings.heading: How Nerve Breakdown Progresses Over Time
settings.subheading: Most nerve discomfort builds through predictable stages. Recognising yours is the first step.

settings.body: I had given up. Two years of Gabapentin and all it gave me was brain fog and 20 extra pounds. The numbness just kept spreading. My daughter found Romira for me and I figured I had nothing to lose. By week three, I woke up and realized the burning was gone. Not dulled. Gone. I stood in my bathroom and wiggled my toes and I could feel them. I am 67 years old and I sat on the edge of my bathtub and cried.

The neuropathy had stolen my retirement. I could not travel, could not walk the beach with my wife, could not even stand long enough to cook dinner. I tried every nerve supplement on the market. B12, ALA, magnesium, creams, grounding mats, you name it. Nothing worked because nothing was fixing the real problem. Romira was the first thing that actually made a difference. The tingling is almost gone. My balance is better. I walked on the beach last month for the first time in three years.

I used to dread bedtime. The second my feet hit the sheets the burning would start and I knew I was in for another night of waking up every two hours drenched in sweat. I started Romira and within two weeks the burning had calmed enough for me to sleep through the night. Now at month two, I actually look forward to bed. I wake up rested. My wife says I seem like a different person. I feel like one.
